C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\radar_sim.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\radar_sim.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\radar_sim.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E env "PATH=C:/Users/yarla/Desktop/MSYS2/ucrt64/bin;C:/Users/yarla/Desktop/MSYS2/ucrt64/bin;C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin;C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin;C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin;C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\usr\bin;C:/WINDOWS/system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/WINDOWS/System32/Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:/WINDOWS/System32/OpenSSH/;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:/Program Files/NVIDIA Corporation/NVIDIA App/NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:/Program Files/nodejs/;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:/Users/yarla/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps;C:\Users\yarla\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:/Users/yarla/.dotnet/tools;C:\Users\yarla\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:/Users/yarla/AppData/Roaming/npm;C:\Users\yarla\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:/Rojo/;C:\Users\yarla\miniconda3\condabin;C:/Users/yarla/miniconda3/Scripts;C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin;" C:\Users\yarla\Desktop\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\radar_sim.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o radar_sim.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libradar_sim.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\radar_sim.dir\linkLibs.rsp
